---
title: "In Memoriam: Jaime Carbonell"
description: "On the passing of a kind and gentle soul, a towering figure in NLP and ML."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-02-28"
categories: [CMU, NLP, history, personal]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Jaime Carbonell. Image from [CMU](https://www.cmu.edu/news/stories/archives/2020/february/jaime-carbonell-obituary.html).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

A kind and gentle soul, a towering figure in the NLP and ML communities. Thank you so much for your guidance, and rest in peace, Jaime.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_jaime-carbonell-pioneered-use-of-computers-activity-6639268445202579458-RpeW).*
